findings.evidence: Repeated obstruction outcomes with minimal leverage change: snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:5; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:19; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:206; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:224; snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:232.
findings.problem: The records-access spine repeats the same denial beat five times before a meaningful tactical shift, which flattens causal velocity in the second half and delays the chapter's propulsion into chapter 7.
findings.rewrite_direction: Target the denial chain anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:206, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:232. Compress one denial beat and upgrade another into a materially new obstacle (named decision-maker, specific order reference, or exploitable loophole) so each refusal changes Lena's options.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if, when reading the revised sequence around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:5, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:19, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:206, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:232, each denial introduces a distinct new constraint or lead; fail if two consecutive denial beats end with no new actionable information.

findings.evidence: Pressure pivots are summarized instead of staged at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:57 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:280.
findings.problem: Sanitization drift: the chapter reports high-stakes turns in recap form (pre-conflict family baseline and the Mara risk-terms argument) rather than rendering them in-scene. Summary is replacing scene at narrative hinges.
findings.rewrite_direction: Expand snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:57 into brief on-page family interaction that seeds later conflict texture, and expand snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:280 into explicit live negotiation (6-10 lines of dialogue/action) showing terms, resistance, and concession before the operation trigger.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if revised passages around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:57 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:280 contain concrete spoken terms and a visible concession from one side; fail if either pivot remains paraphrased recap.

findings.evidence: Long exterior-only run in dinner confrontation from snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:73 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, with interiority not reappearing until snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:101.
findings.problem: A 10+ paragraph interiority gap (14 consecutive paragraphs) turns close-third focalization into screenplay cadence during a major family-stakes exchange.
findings.rewrite_direction: In the confrontation run anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:75, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:89, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99, add 2-3 compact interior beats (thought, body sensation, memory, or self-assessment) tied directly to Lena's decision pressure, without slowing conflict turns.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised run around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:75 through snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:99 includes at least two separate Lena-interiority paragraphs and no purely external run exceeds nine consecutive paragraphs; fail otherwise.

findings.evidence: Custody escalation is cut short at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157-167, with fallout deferred to texts at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:185 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:256.
findings.problem: Timidity: at the emotional peak of Marcus's custody ultimatum, the prose retreats from live confrontation and shifts consequence to remote messaging, reducing immediate embodied cost.
findings.rewrite_direction: Rework snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157-167 so Lena must answer in-scene and the exchange lands one concrete same-night consequence (explicit transport handoff, custody paperwork step, or boundary condition), then keep later texts as aftershock rather than primary delivery.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised snapshot around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:157-167 contains Lena's explicit response and a visible concrete consequence before scene exit; fail if the principal consequence remains deferred to later text messages.

findings.evidence: High-pressure exchange remains syntactically polished at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:93-97 and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:105-117.
findings.problem: Dialogue register drifts formal under stress: key turns are cleanly explanatory and rhetorically complete where interruption, overlap, and rougher colloquial collision would better fit the scene's pressure and the book's high-contraction dialogue baseline.
findings.rewrite_direction: Adjust the exchange anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:93, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:105, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:117 to preserve factual content but introduce pressure texture: at least one interruption, one clipped self-correction, and shorter adversarial turns across Lena, Marcus, and Jalen.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if the revised exchange around snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:93 to snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:117 shows at least three pressure markers (interruption dash, overlap, clipped restart, or fragment) while retaining the bluff-vs-oath legal distinction; fail if the exchange remains uniformly polished full clauses.

findings.evidence: Recurring micro-gesture construction appears more than twice at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:208.
findings.problem: A repeated 'once/one short + gesture' formula flattens emotional differentiation at turning points; it reads as a prose tic rather than deliberate variation.
findings.rewrite_direction: Revise at least two of snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:208 to distinct, character-specific physical beats that avoid the same quantifier template.
findings.acceptance_test: Pass if no more than two instances of the 'once/one short + gesture' template remain across the sequence anchored at snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:27, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:139, snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:153, and snapshots/cycle_02/chapters/chapter_06.md:208, and each retained instance serves a different emotional function; fail otherwise.

summary: Chapter 6 lands core causal beats and maintains continuity/tense consistency, but it does not clear pass-level quality because pivotal pressure points are summarized, one major confrontation retreats from embodied consequence, dinner focalization drops interior access for too long, and dialogue/prose texture shows polish/repetition where sharper variation is needed.
